---
title: Fixture — clean prose
---

The studio runs its agents through a Git hosting platform. Work arrives as
issues. Agents propose pull requests, and one human merges them.

Every model run appends a line to the cost ledger: model, tokens, estimated
cost, duration, outcome. The month's spend is published on the portal, live
from that ledger — estimates at list prices, never invoices.

A picture frame hangs in the office, and the house framing passed
inspection. The video renders at sixty frames per second.

The dataset covers 163 sites. Each record cites its sources, and the CI
checks referential integrity on every pull request.
